mapper.select: SELECT START_DATE AS startDate, END_DATE AS endDate, ACCOUNT_NO AS accountNo, USER_ID AS userId, CUST_REG_NO AS custRegNo, TEL_NO AS telNo, USER_IP AS userIp, ORG_FILE_NM AS orgFileNm, U_FILE_NM AS uFileNm, COALESCE(FILE_URL,'') AS fileUrl, BATCH_YN AS batchYn, APPLY_YN AS applyYn, APPROVAL_REQ_ID AS approvalReqId FROM mhdb.TB_BULK_JOB_REQ WHERE 1=1 AND APPROVAL_REQ_ID = #{approvalReqId} ORDER BY REQ_DATE
